style: progressive house, EDM, euphoric synths, driving bass, festival anthem, energetic drops, wide stereo, 128 BPM

songs.title: Neon Horizon
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Atmospheric synth build)

[Verse 1]
Chasing lights through the midnight sky
Feel the beat as the world flies by
No looking back, just the open road
Every heartbeat about to explode

[Build]
Higher, higher, we're rising up
Nothing can stop us now

[Drop]
Neon horizon, electric dreams
Nothing is ever what it seems
Lost in the music, lost in the sound
Feet off the ground

[Verse 2]
Strangers dancing under the stars
City lights shining from afar

[Drop]
Neon horizon, electric dreams
We are the fire, we are the screams

[Bridge]
(Breakdown - piano + vocal chops)

[Final Drop]
Neon horizon...

songs.title: Midnight Protocol
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Signals in the dark, frequency unknown
Pulse is getting stronger, you're not alone

[Build]
Lock in, sync up, we're breaking through

[Drop]
Midnight protocol, engage the sound
Shake the walls, shake the ground
Bass is heavy, lights are low
Let the rhythm take control

[Verse 2]
Binary heartbeats, digital souls
Connected by the bass that rolls

[Drop]
Midnight protocol, engage the sound
We won't stop till the sun comes round

[Outro]
(Fade out with reverb tail)
